OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith, Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Webco Group LLC is present. Represented by Eric Hu.
Attorney Saul M. Ferster appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Douglas Wade is present.
Attorney Richard McNelis representing the defendant through full scope.

The settlement attorney Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.
This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of OCT-24-2011 is vacated.
